[[File:Empathic.svg|thumb]]
Empathic entrapment is one of the [[nine plagues]], it is an inability to make other perspectives plausible to you, this keeps you in a state of ignorance as you are unable to understand why someone may believe something<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref>

As it is a [[New plagues|new plague]] it does not have a well defined booster shot against it yet, although the booster shot is linked to [[larping]] and [[gnosis]] and a subtype of the [[Booster shots|booster shot]] of [[enstuckment]].

== References ==
[[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Limitation]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Limitation]][[Category:Empathic entrapment]]
[[sn:Limitation]]
[[Category:Pages]]
